Jaipur.message: No active alerts. City is calm and tourist-friendly.

Delhi.message: Moderate air pollution levels reported. Sensitive travelers should carry masks.

Agra.message: No active alerts. Ideal conditions for sightseeing.

Shimla.message: Landslide risk in outer areas due to recent rainfall. Avoid remote routes.

Manali.message: Heavy snowfall expected. Rohtang Pass route closed until further notice.

Udaipur.message: No active alerts. Lake activities operating normally.

Jaisalmer.message: Extreme heat advisory. Avoid desert safaris between 12 PM - 4 PM.

Goa.message: No active alerts. Beaches open with normal tidal activity.

Mumbai.message: Heavy traffic congestion reported due to monsoon waterlogging in low-lying areas.
